title: picea brachytyla var. ascendens
intro: Picea brachytyla var. ascendens, also known as Korean black spruce, is a variant of the Picea brachytyla species, a type of evergreen coniferous tree native to East Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Korean black spruce include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
